args: p_user_id uuid, p_name text, p_role text, p_status text, p_operator_number text
returns: TABLE(user_id uuid, email text, name text, role text, status text, operator_number text, updated_at timestamp with time zone)
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.admin_update_user_profile(p_user_id uuid, p_name text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_role text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_status text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_operator_number text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(user_id uuid, email text, name text, role text, status text, operator_number text, updated_at timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  perform 1
  from public.profiles p_admin
  where p_admin.user_id = auth.uid()
    and lower(coalesce(p_admin.role, '')) = 'admin';

  if not found then
    raise exception 'Brak uprawnien administratora';
  end if;

  update public.profiles p
  set
    name = coalesce(nullif(btrim(coalesce(p_name, '')), ''), p.name),
    role = coalesce(lower(nullif(btrim(coalesce(p_role, '')), '')), p.role),
    status = coalesce(lower(nullif(btrim(coalesce(p_status, '')), '')), p.status),
    operator_number = case
      when p_operator_number is null then p.operator_number
      else nullif(btrim(p_operator_number), '')
    end,
    updated_at = now()
  where p.user_id = p_user_id;

  return query
  select
    p.user_id,
    p.email,
    p.name,
    lower(coalesce(p.role, 'user')) as role,
    lower(coalesce(p.status, 'inactive')) as status,
    p.operator_number,
    p.updated_at
  from public.profiles p
  where p.user_id = p_user_id
  limit 1;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.cleanup_sessions()
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
begin

  update sessions
  set status = 'closed'
  where status = 'active'
  and last_activity < now() - interval '5 minutes';

end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.close_inactive_sessions()
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_closed_count integer := 0;
begin
  with stale_sessions as (
    update public.sessions
    set
      status = 'closed',
      ended_at = coalesce(ended_at, now()),
      last_activity = now()
    where lower(coalesce(status, '')) in ('active', 'paused')
      and coalesce(last_activity, started_at, created_at) < now() - interval '15 minutes'
    returning id
  )
  select count(*)
  into v_closed_count
  from stale_sessions;

  update public.locations
  set
    status = 'pending',
    locked_by = null,
    locked_at = null,
    session_id = null
  where session_id in (
    select s.id
    from public.sessions s
    where lower(coalesce(s.status, '')) = 'closed'
      and s.ended_at is not null
  )
    and lower(coalesce(status, '')) = 'in_progress';

  return v_closed_count;
end;
$function$

args: p_location_id uuid, p_session_id uuid, p_user_id uuid, p_operator_email text
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.complete_manual_location_check(p_location_id uuid, p_session_id uuid, p_user_id uuid, p_operator_email text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_location public.locations;
begin
  update public.locations
  set
    status = 'done',
    locked_by = null,
    locked_at = null,
    session_id = null
  where id = p_location_id
    and status = 'in_progress'
    and (locked_by is null or locked_by = p_user_id)
    and (session_id is null or session_id = p_session_id)
  returning * into v_location;

  if v_location.id is null then
    raise exception 'LOCATION_NOT_IN_PROGRESS';
  end if;
end;
$function$

args: p_location_id uuid, p_session_id uuid, p_user_id uuid, p_operator_email text, p_zone text
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.confirm_empty_location(p_location_id uuid, p_session_id uuid, p_user_id uuid, p_operator_email text, p_zone text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_location public.locations;
  v_entry_id uuid;
  v_session_site_id text;
begin
  update public.locations
  set
    status = 'done',
    locked_by = null,
    locked_at = null,
    session_id = null,
    last_gap_inventory = now()
  where id = p_location_id
    and status = 'in_progress'
  returning * into v_location;

  if v_location.id is null then
    raise exception 'LOCATION_NOT_IN_PROGRESS';
  end if;

  select s.site_id
  into v_session_site_id
  from public.sessions s
  where s.id = p_session_id;

  insert into public.entries (
    session_id,
    user_id,
    operator,
    site_id,
    location,
    ean,
    sku,
    lot,
    type,
    quantity,
    confirmed,
    timestamp,
    created_at,
    operation_id
  )
  values (
    p_session_id,
    p_user_id,
    p_operator_email,
    v_session_site_id,
    v_location.code,
    null,
    null,
    p_zone,
    'checked_empty',
    0,
    true,
    now(),
    now(),
    gen_random_uuid()
  )
  returning id into v_entry_id;

  insert into public.empty_location_inventory_log (
    location_id,
    session_id,
    user_id,
    operator_email,
    zone,
    action,
    related_entry_id
  ) values (
    p_location_id,
    p_session_id,
    p_user_id,
    p_operator_email,
    p_zone,
    'confirmed_empty',
    v_entry_id
  );
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.end_work_session(p_session_id uuid)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  update public.sessions
  set
    status = 'closed',
    ended_at = coalesce(ended_at, now()),
    last_activity = now()
  where id = p_session_id
    and lower(coalesce(status, '')) in ('active', 'paused');

  update public.locations
  set
    status = 'pending',
    locked_by = null,
    locked_at = null,
    session_id = null
  where session_id = p_session_id
    and lower(coalesce(status, '')) = 'in_progress';
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_admin_auth_logs(p_user_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid, p_limit integer DEFAULT 200)
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, created_at timestamp with time zone, user_id uuid, user_email text, user_name text, event_type text, entity text, status text, message text, payload jsonb, source text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  perform 1
  from public.profiles p_admin
  where p_admin.user_id = auth.uid()
    and lower(coalesce(p_admin.role, '')) = 'admin';

  if not found then
    raise exception 'Brak uprawnien administratora';
  end if;

  return query
  select
    a.id,
    a.created_at,
    a.user_id,
    coalesce(a.email, p.email) as user_email,
    coalesce(p.name, p.email, a.email, 'Nieznany uzytkownik') as user_name,
    a.event_type,
    'auth'::text as entity,
    case
      when a.success then 'success'
      else 'failed'
    end as status,
    coalesce(a.message, a.event_type) as message,
    coalesce(a.metadata, '{}'::jsonb) as payload,
    'auth_event_logs'::text as source
  from public.auth_event_logs a
  left join public.profiles p
    on p.user_id = a.user_id
  where p_user_id is null or a.user_id = p_user_id
  order by a.created_at desc nulls last
  limit greatest(coalesce(p_limit, 200), 1);
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_admin_config_change_logs(p_limit integer DEFAULT 200)
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, created_at timestamp with time zone, user_id uuid, user_email text, user_name text, event_type text, entity text, status text, message text, payload jsonb, source text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  perform 1
  from public.profiles p_admin
  where p_admin.user_id = auth.uid()
    and lower(coalesce(p_admin.role, '')) = 'admin';

  if not found then
    raise exception 'Brak uprawnien administratora';
  end if;

  return query
  select
    c.id,
    c.created_at,
    c.user_id,
    p.email as user_email,
    coalesce(p.name, p.email, 'Administrator') as user_name,
    upper(coalesce(c.action, 'UPDATE')) as event_type,
    coalesce(c.scope, 'manual_process') as entity,
    'success'::text as status,
    'Zmiana konfiguracji procesu'::text as message,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'site_id', c.site_id,
      'before_config', c.before_config,
      'after_config', c.after_config
    ) as payload,
    'config_change_logs'::text as source
  from public.config_change_logs c
  left join public.profiles p
    on p.user_id = c.user_id
  order by c.created_at desc nulls last
  limit greatest(coalesce(p_limit, 200), 1);
end;
$function$

 SET search_path TO 'public'

begin
  perform 1

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_admin_log_users()
 RETURNS TABLE(user_id uuid, email text, name text, role text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  perform 1
  from public.profiles p_admin
  where p_admin.user_id = auth.uid()
    and lower(coalesce(p_admin.role, '')) = 'admin';

  if not found then
    raise exception 'Brak uprawnien administratora';
  end if;

  return query
  select
    p.user_id,

definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_admin_system_health_alerts()
 RETURNS TABLE(code text, title text, category text, severity text, value text, description text, recommendation text)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
with summary as (
  select *
  from public.get_admin_system_health_summary()
),
signals as (
  select
    'database_connection'::text as code,
    'Polaczenie z baza'::text as title,
    'Infrastruktura'::text as category,
    'healthy'::text as severity,
    database_status::text as value,
    'Panel otrzymal odpowiedz z backendu, wiec baza odpowiada.'::text as description,
    'Brak wymaganej akcji.'::text as recommendation,
    100 as sort_order
  from summary
  union all
  select 'active_users','Aktywni uzytkownicy','Operacje','healthy',active_users::text,'Liczba unikalnych operatorow z aktywna sesja.','Wartosc informacyjna dla administratora.',90 from summary
  union all
  select 'active_sessions','Aktywne sesje','Operacje',case when active_sessions = 0 then 'warning' else 'healthy' end,active_sessions::text,'Liczba sesji oznaczonych jako active.',case when active_sessions = 0 then 'Sprawdz, czy operatorzy moga poprawnie rozpoczynac prace.' else 'Brak wymaganej akcji.' end,89 from summary
  union all
  select 'paused_sessions','Sesje wstrzymane','Operacje',case when paused_sessions >= 5 then 'warning' else 'healthy' end,paused_sessions::text,'Liczba sesji w stanie paused.',case when paused_sessions >= 5 then 'Zweryfikuj, czy operatorzy nie porzucili zbyt wielu procesow.' else 'Brak wymaganej akcji.' end,88 from summary
  union all
  select 'stale_sessions','Martwe sesje','Operacje',case when stale_sessions >= 3 then 'critical' when stale_sessions > 0 then 'warning' else 'healthy' end,stale_sessions::text,'Aktywne sesje bez swiezej aktywnosci przez co najmniej 15 minut.',case when stale_sessions >= 3 then 'Zalecane czyszczenie sesji i kontrola heartbeat.' when stale_sessions > 0 then 'Zweryfikuj, czy operator nie zostal rozlaczony.' else 'Brak wymaganej akcji.' end,30 from summary
  union all
  select 'in_progress_locations','Lokalizacje w toku','Magazyn','healthy',in_progress_locations::text,'Liczba lokalizacji aktualnie przypisanych do operatorow.','Wartosc informacyjna dla administratora.',87 from summary
  union all
  select 'stale_locations','Porzucone lokalizacje','Magazyn',case when stale_locations > 0 then 'critical' else 'healthy' end,stale_locations::text,'Lokalizacje in_progress bez zywej sesji lub z przeterminowanym lockiem.',case when stale_locations > 0 then 'Wymagane odblokowanie i przeglad procesu.' else 'Brak wymaganej akcji.' end,20 from summary
  union all
  select 'unresolved_issues','Otwarte problemy','Jakosc procesu',case when unresolved_issues >= 5 then 'critical' when unresolved_issues > 0 then 'warning' else 'healthy' end,unresolved_issues::text,'Zgloszenia problemow, ktore nie zostaly jeszcze zamkniete.',case when unresolved_issues >= 5 then 'Priorytetowo przejrzyj otwarte problemy.' when unresolved_issues > 0 then 'Zaplanij przeglad zgloszen.' else 'Brak wymaganej akcji.' end,40 from summary
  union all
  select 'recent_entries_1h','Wpisy z ostatniej godziny','Aktywnosc',case when active_sessions > 0 and recent_entries_1h = 0 then 'warning' else 'healthy' end,recent_entries_1h::text,'Liczba wpisow w entries z ostatnich 60 minut.',case when active_sessions > 0 and recent_entries_1h = 0 then 'Sprawdz, czy operatorzy nie utkneli na zapisie lub walidacji.' else 'Brak wymaganej akcji.' end,50 from summary
  union all
  select 'locked_accounts','Zablokowane konta','Bezpieczenstwo',case when locked_accounts > 0 then 'warning' else 'healthy' end,locked_accounts::text,'Konta z aktywnym lock_until.',case when locked_accounts > 0 then 'Zweryfikuj, czy blokady sa zamierzone.' else 'Brak wymaganej akcji.' end,60 from summary
  union all
  select 'users_without_role','Profile bez roli','Uprawnienia',case when users_without_role > 0 then 'critical' else 'healthy' end,users_without_role::text,'Profile bez przypisanej roli moga miec nieprzewidywalny dostep do modulow.',case when users_without_role > 0 then 'Ustaw role dla wszystkich profilow.' else 'Brak wymaganej akcji.' end,10 from summary
)
select
  code,
  title,
  category,
  severity,
  value,
  description,
  recommendation
from signals
order by
  case severity
    when 'critical' then 1
    when 'warning' then 2
    else 3
  end,
  sort_order,
  title;
$function$

returns: TABLE(overall_status text, overall_label text, database_status text, active_users integer, active_sessions integer, paused_sessions integer, in_progress_locations integer, stale_sessions integer, stale_locations integer, unresolved_issues integer, recent_entries_1h integer, locked_accounts integer, users_without_role integer, generated_at timestamp with time zone)
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_admin_system_health_summary()
 RETURNS TABLE(overall_status text, overall_label text, database_status text, active_users integer, active_sessions integer, paused_sessions integer, in_progress_locations integer, stale_sessions integer, stale_locations integer, unresolved_issues integer, recent_entries_1h integer, locked_accounts integer, users_without_role integer, generated_at timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
with session_stats as (
  select
    count(*) filter (where lower(coalesce(s.status, '')) = 'active')::integer as active_sessions,
    count(*) filter (where lower(coalesce(s.status, '')) = 'paused')::integer as paused_sessions,
    count(distinct s.user_id) filter (
      where lower(coalesce(s.status, '')) = 'active'
        and s.user_id is not null
    )::integer as active_users,
    count(*) filter (
      where lower(coalesce(s.status, '')) = 'active'
        and coalesce(s.last_activity, s.started_at, s.created_at) < now() - interval '15 minutes'
    )::integer as stale_sessions
  from public.sessions s
),
location_stats as (
  select
    count(*) filter (where lower(coalesce(l.status, '')) = 'in_progress')::integer as in_progress_locations,
    count(*) filter (
      where lower(coalesce(l.status, '')) = 'in_progress'
        and (
          coalesce(l.locked_at, now()) < now() - interval '20 minutes'
          or l.session_id is null
          or s.id is null
          or lower(coalesce(s.status, '')) not in ('active', 'paused')
        )
    )::integer as stale_locations
  from public.locations l
  left join public.sessions s
    on s.id = l.session_id
),
issue_stats as (
  select
    count(*) filter (
      where lower(coalesce(i.status, '')) not in ('resolved', 'closed', 'done')
    )::integer as unresolved_issues
  from public.empty_location_issues i
),
entry_stats as (
  select
    count(*) filter (
      where coalesce(e.timestamp, e.created_at) >= now() - interval '1 hour'
    )::integer as recent_entries_1h
  from public.entries e
),
profile_stats as (
  select
    count(*) filter (
      where p.lock_until is not null
        and p.lock_until > now()
    )::integer as locked_accounts,
    count(*) filter (
      where nullif(btrim(coalesce(p.role, '')), '') is null
    )::integer as users_without_role
  from public.profiles p
),
calc as (
  select
    ss.active_users,
    ss.active_sessions,
    ss.paused_sessions,
    ls.in_progress_locations,
    ss.stale_sessions,
    ls.stale_locations,
    is2.unresolved_issues,
    es.recent_entries_1h,
    ps.locked_accounts,
    ps.users_without_role
  from session_stats ss
  cross join location_stats ls
  cross join issue_stats is2
  cross join entry_stats es
  cross join profile_stats ps
)
select
  case
    when stale_locations > 0 or stale_sessions >= 3 or users_without_role > 0 then 'critical'
    when unresolved_issues > 0
      or locked_accounts > 0
      or paused_sessions >= 5
      or (active_sessions > 0 and recent_entries_1h = 0)
    then 'warning'
    else 'healthy'
  end as overall_status,
  case
    when stale_locations > 0 or stale_sessions >= 3 or users_without_role > 0 then 'Wymagana pilna reakcja administratora'
    when unresolved_issues > 0
      or locked_accounts > 0
      or paused_sessions >= 5
      or (active_sessions > 0 and recent_entries_1h = 0)
    then 'System dziala, ale wymaga uwagi'
    else 'System pracuje stabilnie'
  end as overall_label,
  'connected'::text as database_status,
  active_users,
  active_sessions,
  paused_sessions,
  in_progress_locations,
  stale_sessions,
  stale_locations,
  unresolved_issues,
  recent_entries_1h,
  locked_accounts,
  users_without_role,
  now() as generated_at
from calc;
$function$

returns: TABLE(id uuid, created_at timestamp with time zone, user_id uuid, user_email text, user_name text, event_type text, entity text, status text, message text, payload jsonb, source text)
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_admin_user_action_logs(p_user_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid, p_limit integer DEFAULT 200)
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, created_at timestamp with time zone, user_id uuid, user_email text, user_name text, event_type text, entity text, status text, message text, payload jsonb, source text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  perform 1
  from public.profiles p_admin
  where p_admin.user_id = auth.uid()
    and lower(coalesce(p_admin.role, '')) = 'admin';

  if not found then
    raise exception 'Brak uprawnien administratora';
  end if;

  return query
  with merged as (
    select
      a.id,
      a.created_at,
      a.user_id,
      p.email as user_email,
      p.name as user_name,
      coalesce(a.action, 'AUDIT_EVENT') as event_type,
      coalesce(a.entity, 'audit_log') as entity,
      'success'::text as status,
      coalesce(a.action, 'Zdarzenie audytowe') as message,
      coalesce(a.payload, '{}'::jsonb) as payload,
      'audit_log'::text as source
    from public.audit_log a
    left join public.profiles p
      on p.user_id = a.user_id

    union all

    select
      e.id,
      e.created_at,
      e.user_id,
      coalesce(p.email, e.operator_email) as user_email,
      p.name as user_name,
      coalesce(e.action, 'EMPTY_LOCATION_EVENT') as event_type,
      'empty_location_process'::text as entity,
      'success'::text as status,
      coalesce(e.action, 'Akcja procesu pustych lokalizacji') as message,
      jsonb_build_object(
        'location_id', e.location_id,
        'session_id', e.session_id,
        'zone', e.zone,
        'related_entry_id', e.related_entry_id,
        'issue_id', e.issue_id
      ) as payload,
      'empty_location_inventory_log'::text as source
    from public.empty_location_inventory_log e
    left join public.profiles p
      on p.user_id = e.user_id

    union all

    select
      i.id,
      i.created_at,
      i.user_id,
      p.email as user_email,
      p.name as user_name,
      coalesce(i.type, 'IMPORT') as event_type,
      'import'::text as entity,
      'success'::text as status,
      concat('Import rekordow: ', coalesce(i.records_count, 0)::text) as message,
      jsonb_build_object(
        'records_count', i.records_count,
        'type', i.type
      ) as payload,
      'import_logs'::text as source
    from public.import_logs i
    left join public.profiles p
      on p.user_id = i.user_id
  )
  select
    m.id,
    m.created_at,
    m.user_id,
    m.user_email,
    coalesce(m.user_name, m.user_email, 'Nieznany uzytkownik') as user_name,
    m.event_type,
    m.entity,
    m.status,
    m.message,
    m.payload,
    m.source
  from merged m
  where p_user_id is null or m.user_id = p_user_id
  order by m.created_at desc nulls last
  limit greatest(coalesce(p_limit, 200), 1);
end;
$function$

returns: TABLE(user_id uuid, email text, name text, role text, status text, operator_number text, last_activity timestamp with time zone, latest_session_status text, last_login_at timestamp with time zone)
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_admin_users_overview()
 RETURNS TABLE(user_id uuid, email text, name text, role text, status text, operator_number text, last_activity timestamp with time zone, latest_session_status text, last_login_at timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  perform 1
  from public.profiles p_admin
  where p_admin.user_id = auth.uid()
    and lower(coalesce(p_admin.role, '')) = 'admin';

  if not found then
    raise exception 'Brak uprawnien administratora';
  end if;

  return query
  with latest_sessions as (
    select distinct on (s.user_id)
      s.user_id,
      s.status,
      coalesce(s.last_activity, s.ended_at, s.started_at, s.created_at) as last_activity
    from public.sessions s
    where s.user_id is not null
    order by s.user_id, coalesce(s.last_activity, s.ended_at, s.started_at, s.created_at) desc
  ),
  latest_logins as (
    select
      a.user_id,
      max(a.created_at) as last_login_at
    from public.auth_event_logs a
    where lower(coalesce(a.event_type, '')) in ('login_success', 'login')
      and coalesce(a.success, false) = true
      and a.user_id is not null
    group by a.user_id
  )
  select
    p.user_id,
    p.email,
    coalesce(nullif(btrim(coalesce(p.name, '')), ''), p.email, 'Nieznany uzytkownik') as name,
    lower(coalesce(p.role, 'user')) as role,
    lower(coalesce(p.status, 'inactive')) as status,
    p.operator_number,
    ls.last_activity,
    lower(coalesce(ls.status, '')) as latest_session_status,
    ll.last_login_at
  from public.profiles p
  left join latest_sessions ls
    on ls.user_id = p.user_id
  left join latest_logins ll
    on ll.user_id = p.user_id
  where p.user_id is not null
  order by coalesce(p.updated_at, p.created_at) desc nulls last, p.email asc nulls last;
end;
$function$

returns: TABLE(checked_locations bigint, operations_count bigint, shortages_count bigint, surpluses_count bigint, problems_count bigint, shortage_value numeric, surplus_value numeric, total_difference_value numeric, avg_location_control_minutes numeric, locations_per_hour numeric, avg_operations_per_session numeric, sessions_count bigint, avg_session_minutes numeric, longest_session_minutes numeric)
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_dashboard_summary(p_year integer DEFAULT NULL::integer, p_month integer DEFAULT NULL::integer)
 RETURNS TABLE(checked_locations bigint, operations_count bigint, shortages_count bigint, surpluses_count bigint, problems_count bigint, shortage_value numeric, surplus_value numeric, total_difference_value numeric, avg_location_control_minutes numeric, locations_per_hour numeric, avg_operations_per_session numeric, sessions_count bigint, avg_session_minutes numeric, longest_session_minutes numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
with filtered_entries as (
  select *
  from public.entries e
  where (p_year is null or extract(year from coalesce(e.timestamp, e.created_at)) = p_year)
    and (p_month is null or extract(month from coalesce(e.timestamp, e.created_at)) = p_month)
),
entry_values as (
  select
    e.location,
    e.session_id,
    e.type,
    e.quantity,
    coalesce(e.timestamp, e.created_at) as event_at,
    case
      when lower(trim(coalesce(e.type, ''))) in ('surplus', 'nadwyzka', 'nadwyżka') then 'surplus'
      when lower(trim(coalesce(e.type, ''))) in ('shortage', 'brak') then 'shortage'
      when lower(trim(coalesce(e.type, ''))) = 'problem' then 'problem'
      when lower(trim(coalesce(e.type, ''))) = 'checked_empty' then 'checked_empty'
      else lower(trim(coalesce(e.type, '')))
    end as normalized_type,
    coalesce(pr.price, 0)::numeric as unit_price
  from filtered_entries e
  left join public.products p
    on p.sku = e.sku
  left join public.prices pr
    on pr.product_id = p.id
),
filtered_issues as (
  select *
  from public.empty_location_issues i
  where (p_year is null or extract(year from i.created_at) = p_year)
    and (p_month is null or extract(month from i.created_at) = p_month)
),
session_ids_with_entries as (
  select distinct session_id
  from filtered_entries
  where session_id is not null
),
filtered_sessions as (
  select
    s.*,
    greatest(
      extract(epoch from coalesce(s.ended_at, s.last_activity, s.started_at) - s.started_at) / 60.0,
      0
    )::numeric as duration_minutes
  from public.sessions s
  join session_ids_with_entries se
    on se.session_id = s.id
),
location_spans as (
  select
    session_id,
    location,
    min(event_at) as first_at,
    max(event_at) as last_at
  from entry_values
  where nullif(trim(location), '') is not null
  group by session_id, location
),
location_stats as (
  select
    coalesce(
      avg(greatest(extract(epoch from last_at - first_at), 0) / 60.0),
      0
    )::numeric as avg_location_control_minutes
  from location_spans
),
entry_stats as (
  select
    count(distinct nullif(trim(location), ''))::bigint as checked_locations,
    count(*)::bigint as operations_count,
    count(*) filter (where normalized_type = 'shortage')::bigint as shortages_count,
    count(*) filter (where normalized_type = 'surplus')::bigint as surpluses_count,
    count(*) filter (where normalized_type = 'problem')::bigint as problem_entries_count,
    coalesce(sum(case when normalized_type = 'shortage' then coalesce(quantity, 0) * unit_price else 0 end), 0)::numeric as shortage_value,
    coalesce(sum(case when normalized_type = 'surplus' then coalesce(quantity, 0) * unit_price else 0 end), 0)::numeric as surplus_value
  from entry_values
),
issue_stats as (
  select count(*)::bigint as issue_problems_count
  from filtered_issues
),
session_stats as (
  select
    count(*)::bigint as sessions_count,
    coalesce(avg(duration_minutes), 0)::numeric as avg_session_minutes,
    coalesce(max(duration_minutes), 0)::numeric as longest_session_minutes,
    coalesce(sum(duration_minutes), 0)::numeric as total_session_minutes
  from filtered_sessions
)
select
  es.checked_locations,
  es.operations_count,
  es.shortages_count,
  es.surpluses_count,
  (es.problem_entries_count + is2.issue_problems_count)::bigint as problems_count,
  round(es.shortage_value, 2) as shortage_value,
  round(es.surplus_value, 2) as surplus_value,
  round(es.shortage_value + es.surplus_value, 2) as total_difference_value,
  round(ls.avg_location_control_minutes, 2) as avg_location_control_minutes,
  round(
    case
      when ss.total_session_minutes > 0
        then es.checked_locations::numeric / (ss.total_session_minutes / 60.0)
      else 0
    end,
    2
  ) as locations_per_hour,
  round(
    case
      when ss.sessions_count > 0
        then es.operations_count::numeric / ss.sessions_count
      else 0
    end,
    2
  ) as avg_operations_per_session,
  ss.sessions_count,
  round(ss.avg_session_minutes, 2) as avg_session_minutes,
  round(ss.longest_session_minutes, 2) as longest_session_minutes
from entry_stats es
cross join issue_stats is2
cross join session_stats ss
cross join location_stats ls;
$function$

returns: TABLE(zone text, checked_locations bigint, operations_count bigint, shortages_count bigint, surpluses_count bigint, problems_count bigint, shortage_value numeric, surplus_value numeric, total_difference_value numeric)
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_dashboard_zone_stats(p_year integer DEFAULT NULL::integer, p_month integer DEFAULT NULL::integer)
 RETURNS TABLE(zone text, checked_locations bigint, operations_count bigint, shortages_count bigint, surpluses_count bigint, problems_count bigint, shortage_value numeric, surplus_value numeric, total_difference_value numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
with filtered_entries as (
  select *
  from public.entries e
  where (p_year is null or extract(year from coalesce(e.timestamp, e.created_at)) = p_year)
    and (p_month is null or extract(month from coalesce(e.timestamp, e.created_at)) = p_month)
),
entry_values as (
  select
    coalesce(nullif(l.zone, ''), 'Nieprzypisana') as zone,
    e.location,
    e.type,
    e.quantity,
    case
      when lower(trim(coalesce(e.type, ''))) in ('surplus', 'nadwyzka', 'nadwyżka') then 'surplus'
      when lower(trim(coalesce(e.type, ''))) in ('shortage', 'brak') then 'shortage'
      when lower(trim(coalesce(e.type, ''))) = 'problem' then 'problem'
      when lower(trim(coalesce(e.type, ''))) = 'checked_empty' then 'checked_empty'
      else lower(trim(coalesce(e.type, '')))
    end as normalized_type,
    coalesce(pr.price, 0)::numeric as unit_price
  from filtered_entries e
  left join public.locations l
    on l.code = e.location
  left join public.products p
    on p.sku = e.sku
  left join public.prices pr
    on pr.product_id = p.id
),
issue_values as (
  select
    coalesce(nullif(i.zone, ''), 'Nieprzypisana') as zone,
    count(*)::bigint as problems_count
  from public.empty_location_issues i
  where (p_year is null or extract(year from i.created_at) = p_year)
    and (p_month is null or extract(month from i.created_at) = p_month)
  group by coalesce(nullif(i.zone, ''), 'Nieprzypisana')
),
entry_zone_stats as (
  select
    zone,
    count(distinct nullif(trim(location), ''))::bigint as checked_locations,
    count(*)::bigint as operations_count,
    count(*) filter (where normalized_type = 'shortage')::bigint as shortages_count,
    count(*) filter (where normalized_type = 'surplus')::bigint as surpluses_count,
    count(*) filter (where normalized_type = 'problem')::bigint as entry_problems_count,
    coalesce(sum(case when normalized_type = 'shortage' then coalesce(quantity, 0) * unit_price else 0 end), 0)::numeric as shortage_value,
    coalesce(sum(case when normalized_type = 'surplus' then coalesce(quantity, 0) * unit_price else 0 end), 0)::numeric as surplus_value
  from entry_values
  group by zone
)
select
  coalesce(ezs.zone, iv.zone) as zone,
  coalesce(ezs.checked_locations, 0) as checked_locations,
  coalesce(ezs.operations_count, 0) as operations_count,
  coalesce(ezs.shortages_count, 0) as shortages_count,
  coalesce(ezs.surpluses_count, 0) as surpluses_count,
  coalesce(ezs.entry_problems_count, 0) + coalesce(iv.problems_count, 0) as problems_count,
  round(coalesce(ezs.shortage_value, 0), 2) as shortage_value,
  round(coalesce(ezs.surplus_value, 0), 2) as surplus_value,
  round(coalesce(ezs.shortage_value, 0) + coalesce(ezs.surplus_value, 0), 2) as total_difference_value
from entry_zone_stats ezs
full outer join issue_values iv
  on iv.zone = ezs.zone
order by coalesce(ezs.zone, iv.zone);
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_empty_location_zones(p_site_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(zone text)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  select distinct l.zone
  from public.locations l
  where l.status in ('active', 'pending')
    and l.zone is not null
    and l.zone <> ''
    and (p_site_id is null or l.site_id = p_site_id)
  order by l.zone asc;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_empty_locations_for_zone(p_zone text, p_site_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, code text, zone text, status text, locked_by uuid, locked_at timestamp with time zone, session_id uuid, last_gap_inventory timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  select
    l.id,
    l.code,
    l.zone,
    l.status,
    l.locked_by,
    l.locked_at,
    l.session_id,
    l.last_gap_inventory
  from public.locations l
  left join public.stock s
    on s.location_id = l.id
  where l.zone = p_zone
    and l.status in ('active', 'pending')
    and (p_site_id is null or l.site_id = p_site_id)
  group by l.id, l.code, l.zone, l.status, l.locked_by, l.locked_at, l.session_id, l.last_gap_inventory
  having count(s.id) = 0
  order by l.code asc;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_manual_process_admin_config(p_site_id text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, site_id text, validation_rules jsonb)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  perform 1
  from public.profiles p_admin
  where p_admin.user_id = auth.uid()
    and lower(coalesce(p_admin.role, '')) = 'admin';

  if not found then
    raise exception 'Brak uprawnien administratora';
  end if;

  return query
  select
    pc.id,
    pc.site_id,

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'auth'
AS $function$
begin
  insert into public.profiles (
    id,
    user_id,
    email,
    name,
    role,
    site_id,
    status,
    operator_number,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    failed_attempts,
    login_attempts
  )
  values (
    new.id,
    new.id,
    new.email,
    nullif(coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data ->> 'alias', new.raw_user_meta_data ->> 'name', ''), ''),
    lower(coalesce(nullif(new.raw_user_meta_data ->> 'role', ''), 'user')),
    nullif(coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data ->> 'site_id', ''), ''),
    lower(coalesce(nullif(new.raw_user_meta_data ->> 'status', ''), 'active')),
    nullif(coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data ->> 'operator_number', ''), ''),
    now(),
    now(),
    0,
    0
  )
  on conflict (id) do update
  set
    user_id = excluded.user_id,
    email = coalesce(excluded.email, public.profiles.email),
    name = coalesce(excluded.name, public.profiles.name),
    role = coalesce(excluded.role, public.profiles.role),
    site_id = coalesce(excluded.site_id, public.profiles.site_id),
    status = coalesce(excluded.status, public.profiles.status),
    operator_number = coalesce(excluded.operator_number, public.profiles.operator_number),
    updated_at = now();

  return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.increment_login_attempts(p_email text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
begin
  update profiles
  set
    login_attempts = coalesce(login_attempts, 0) + 1,
    lock_until = case
      when coalesce(login_attempts, 0) + 1 >= 5
        then now() + interval '15 minutes'
      else lock_until
    end
  where email = p_email;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.insert_entry(payload jsonb)
 RETURNS uuid
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_session record;
  v_entry_id uuid;
begin
  select *
  into v_session
  from public.sessions
  where id = (payload->>'session_id')::uuid;

  if v_session is null then
    raise exception 'SESSION_NOT_FOUND';
  end if;

  if v_session.user_id != auth.uid() then
    raise exception 'SESSION_NOT_OWNED';
  end if;

  if not is_session_active(v_session.id) then
    raise exception 'SESSION_TIMEOUT';
  end if;

  if payload->>'location' is null then
    raise exception 'MISSING_LOCATION';
  end if;

  if payload->>'sku' is null then
    raise exception 'MISSING_SKU';
  end if;

  if payload->>'quantity' is null then
    raise exception 'MISSING_QUANTITY';
  end if;

  insert into public.entries (
    session_id,
    user_id,
    operator,
    site_id,
    location,
    ean,
    sku,
    lot,
    expiry,
    expiry_date,
    type,
    quantity,
    approval_status,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    operation_id,
    timestamp
  )
  values (
    v_session.id,
    v_session.user_id,
    v_session.operator,
    v_session.site_id,
    payload->>'location',
    payload->>'ean',
    payload->>'sku',
    payload->>'lot',
    nullif(payload->>'expiry', '')::date,
    nullif(payload->>'expiry_date', '')::date,
    payload->>'type',
    (payload->>'quantity')::numeric,
    coalesce(nullif(payload->>'approval_status', ''), 'pending'),
    now(),
    now(),
    coalesce((payload->>'operation_id')::uuid, gen_random_uuid()),
    coalesce((payload->>'timestamp')::timestamptz, now())
  )
  returning id into v_entry_id;

  insert into public.audit_log (
    user_id,
    action,
    payload,
    created_at
  )
  values (
    v_session.user_id,
    'CREATE_ENTRY',
    jsonb_build_object(
      'entry_id', v_entry_id,
      'session_id', v_session.id,
      'payload', payload
    ),
    now()
  );

  return v_entry_id;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.pause_work_session(p_session_id uuid)
 RETURNS sessions
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_session public.sessions;
begin
  update public.sessions
  set
    status = 'paused',
    last_activity = now()
  where id = p_session_id
    and lower(coalesce(status, '')) = 'active'
  returning * into v_session;

  if v_session.id is null then
    raise exception 'SESSION_NOT_ACTIVE';
  end if;

  update public.locations
  set
    status = 'pending',
    locked_by = null,
    locked_at = null,
    session_id = null
  where session_id = p_session_id
    and lower(coalesce(status, '')) = 'in_progress';

  return v_session;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.report_empty_location_issue(p_location_id uuid, p_session_id uuid, p_user_id uuid, p_operator_email text, p_zone text, p_issue_type text, p_note text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS uuid
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_issue_id uuid;
begin
  insert into public.empty_location_issues (
    location_id,
    session_id,
    user_id,
    operator_email,
    zone,
    issue_type,
    note
  ) values (
    p_location_id,
    p_session_id,
    p_user_id,
    p_operator_email,
    p_zone,
    p_issue_type,
    p_note
  )
  returning id into v_issue_id;

  update public.locations
  set
    status = 'done',
    locked_by = null,
    locked_at = null,
    session_id = null
  where id = p_location_id;

  insert into public.empty_location_inventory_log (
    location_id,
    session_id,
    user_id,
    operator_email,
    zone,
    action,
    issue_id
  ) values (
    p_location_id,
    p_session_id,
    p_user_id,
    p_operator_email,
    p_zone,
    'reported_problem',
    v_issue_id
  );

  return v_issue_id;
end;
$function$

args: p_location_id uuid, p_session_id uuid, p_user_id uuid, p_operator_email text, p_zone text, p_ean text, p_sku text, p_lot text, p_quantity numeric
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.report_empty_location_surplus(p_location_id uuid, p_session_id uuid, p_user_id uuid, p_operator_email text, p_zone text, p_ean text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_sku text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_lot text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_quantity numeric DEFAULT NULL::numeric)
 RETURNS uuid
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_location public.locations;
  v_session record;
  v_entry_id uuid;
begin
  if p_sku is null or btrim(p_sku) = '' then
    raise exception 'MISSING_SKU';
  end if;

  if p_quantity is null or p_quantity <= 0 then
    raise exception 'INVALID_QUANTITY';
  end if;

  select *
  into v_session
  from public.sessions
  where id = p_session_id;

  if v_session is null then
    raise exception 'SESSION_NOT_FOUND';
  end if;

  if v_session.user_id <> p_user_id then
    raise exception 'SESSION_NOT_OWNED';
  end if;

  update public.locations
  set
    status = 'done',
    locked_by = null,
    locked_at = null,
    session_id = null,
    last_gap_inventory = now()
  where id = p_location_id
    and status = 'in_progress'
  returning * into v_location;

  if v_location.id is null then
    raise exception 'LOCATION_NOT_IN_PROGRESS';
  end if;

  insert into public.entries (
    session_id,
    user_id,
    operator,
    site_id,
    location,
    ean,
    sku,
    lot,
    type,
    quantity,
    confirmed,
    timestamp,
    created_at,
    operation_id
  )
  values (
    p_session_id,
    p_user_id,
    p_operator_email,
    v_session.site_id,
    v_location.code,
    nullif(p_ean, ''),
    btrim(p_sku),
    nullif(p_lot, ''),
    'surplus',
    p_quantity,
    true,
    now(),
    now(),
    gen_random_uuid()
  )
  returning id into v_entry_id;

  insert into public.empty_location_inventory_log (
    location_id,
    session_id,
    user_id,
    operator_email,
    zone,
    action,
    related_entry_id
  ) values (
    p_location_id,
    p_session_id,
    p_user_id,
    p_operator_email,
    p_zone,
    'reported_surplus',
    v_entry_id
  );

  return v_entry_id;
end;
$function$

args: p_location_id uuid, p_location_code text, p_session_id uuid, p_user_id uuid, p_operator_email text, p_zone text, p_issue_type text, p_note text, p_source_process text, p_previous_status text
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.report_inventory_location_issue(p_location_id uuid, p_location_code text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_session_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid, p_user_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid, p_operator_email text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_zone text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_issue_type text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_note text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_source_process text DEFAULT 'unknown'::text, p_previous_status text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS uuid
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_issue_id uuid;
  v_previous_status text;
begin
  select coalesce(nullif(p_previous_status, ''), l.status, 'active')
  into v_previous_status
  from public.locations l
  where l.id = p_location_id;

  insert into public.empty_location_issues (
    location_id,
    location_code,
    session_id,
    user_id,
    operator_email,
    zone,
    issue_type,
    note,
    status,
    source_process,
    previous_location_status,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  values (
    p_location_id,
    p_location_code,
    p_session_id,
    p_user_id,
    p_operator_email,
    p_zone,
    p_issue_type,
    p_note,
    'open',
    coalesce(nullif(p_source_process, ''), 'unknown'),
    coalesce(v_previous_status, 'active'),
    now(),
    now()
  )
  returning id into v_issue_id;

  update public.locations
  set
    status = 'blocked',
    locked_by = null,
    locked_at = null,
    session_id = null
  where id = p_location_id;

  insert into public.empty_location_inventory_log (
    location_id,
    session_id,
    user_id,
    operator_email,
    zone,
    action,
    issue_id
  )
  values (
    p_location_id,
    p_session_id,
    p_user_id,
    p_operator_email,
    p_zone,
    'reported_problem',
    v_issue_id
  );

  return v_issue_id;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.reset_login_attempts(p_email text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
begin
  update profiles
  set
    login_attempts = 0,
    lock_until = null
  where email = p_email;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.resume_work_session(p_session_id uuid)
 RETURNS sessions
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_session public.sessions;
begin
  update public.sessions
  set
    status = 'active',
    last_activity = now()
  where id = p_session_id
    and lower(status) = 'paused'
  returning * into v_session;

  if v_session.id is null then
    raise exception 'SESSION_NOT_PAUSED';
  end if;

  return v_session;
end;
$function$

returns: TABLE(id uuid, site_id text, validation_rules jsonb)
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.save_manual_process_admin_config(p_site_id text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_validation_rules jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb)
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, site_id text, validation_rules jsonb)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_before jsonb;
  v_row_id uuid;
begin
  perform 1
  from public.profiles p_admin
  where p_admin.user_id = auth.uid()
    and lower(coalesce(p_admin.role, '')) = 'admin';

  if not found then
    raise exception 'Brak uprawnien administratora';
  end if;

  select pc.validation_rules, pc.id
  into v_before, v_row_id
  from public.process_config pc
  where coalesce(pc.site_id, '') = coalesce(p_site_id, '')
  order by pc.id desc
  limit 1;

  update public.process_config pc
  set
    validation_rules = coalesce(p_validation_rules, '{}'::jsonb),
    updated_at = now()
  where pc.id = v_row_id;

  if not found then
    insert into public.process_config (
      site_id,
      validation_rules,
      updated_at
    )
    values (
      p_site_id,
      coalesce(p_validation_rules, '{}'::jsonb),
      now()
    )
    returning public.process_config.id into v_row_id;
  end if;

  insert into public.config_change_logs (
    user_id,
    site_id,
    scope,
    action,
    before_config,
    after_config
  )
  values (
    auth.uid(),
    p_site_id,
    'manual_process',
    case when v_before is null then 'create' else 'update' end,
    v_before,
    coalesce(p_validation_rules, '{}'::jsonb)
  );

  return query
  select
    pc.id,
    pc.site_id,
    coalesce(pc.validation_rules, '{}'::jsonb) as validation_rules
  from public.process_config pc
  where pc.id = v_row_id
  limit 1;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.start_empty_location_work(p_location_id uuid, p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS locations
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_location public.locations;
  v_session_id uuid;
begin
  select s.id
  into v_session_id
  from public.sessions s
  where s.user_id = p_user_id
    and lower(s.status) = 'active'
  order by s.started_at desc
  limit 1;

  update public.locations
  set
    status = 'in_progress',
    locked_by = p_user_id,
    locked_at = now(),
    session_id = v_session_id
  where id = p_location_id
    and status in ('active', 'pending')
  returning * into v_location;

  if v_location.id is null then
    raise exception 'LOCATION_NOT_AVAILABLE';
  end if;

  return v_location;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.touch_session(p_session_id uuid)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
begin

  update sessions
  set last_activity = now()
  where id = p_session_id
  and user_id = auth.uid();

end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.touch_work_session(p_session_id uuid)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  update public.sessions
  set
    last_activity = now()
  where id = p_session_id
    and lower(status) = 'active';
end;
$function$

args: p_entry_id uuid, p_reason text, p_changes jsonb
definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.update_inventory_history_entry(p_entry_id uuid, p_reason text, p_changes jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb)
 RETURNS uuid
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_role text;
  v_old public.entries%rowtype;
  v_new public.entries%rowtype;
begin
  select lower(coalesce(p.role, ''))
  into v_role
  from public.profiles p
  where p.user_id = auth.uid()
  limit 1;

  if v_role not in ('superuser', 'manager', 'office', 'admin') then
    raise exception 'Brak uprawnien do edycji historii operacji';
  end if;

  if p_reason is null or btrim(p_reason) = '' then
    raise exception 'Powod zmiany jest wymagany';
  end if;

  select *
  into v_old
  from public.entries e
  where e.id = p_entry_id
  limit 1;

  if v_old.id is null then
    raise exception 'Wpis nie istnieje';
  end if;

  update public.entries e
  set
    location = coalesce(p_changes->>'location', e.location),
    sku = coalesce(p_changes->>'sku', e.sku),
    ean = coalesce(p_changes->>'ean', e.ean),
    lot = coalesce(p_changes->>'lot', e.lot),
    quantity = case
      when p_changes ? 'quantity' and nullif(p_changes->>'quantity', '') is not null
        then (p_changes->>'quantity')::numeric
      else e.quantity
    end,
    type = coalesce(p_changes->>'type', e.type)
  where e.id = p_entry_id
  returning * into v_new;

  insert into public.correction_log (
    entry_id,
    user_id,
    reason,
    old_value,
    new_value,
    created_at
  )
  values (
    p_entry_id,
    auth.uid(),
    p_reason,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'location', v_old.location,
      'sku', v_old.sku,
      'ean', v_old.ean,
      'lot', v_old.lot,
      'quantity', v_old.quantity,
      'type', v_old.type
    ),
    jsonb_build_object(
      'location', v_new.location,
      'sku', v_new.sku,
      'ean', v_new.ean,
      'lot', v_new.lot,
      'quantity', v_new.quantity,
      'type', v_new.type
    ),
    now()
  );

  return p_entry_id;
end;
$function$

args: p_entry_id uuid, p_reason_code text, p_comment text, p_changes jsonb
